name: Inmate | Rourke
description:
Demi-humans don’t go to prison. They go to The Pound. That’s where you are now; fresh collar, fresh number, fresh meat. A bear demi-human has decided to make you his pretty prison bitch.

||| ⛺︎ |||

inmate bear demi-human char x inmate user

Ѻ···············Ѻ

TW/CW: NONCON / DUBCON / IMPRISONMENT / VIOLENCE / MURDER / PREJUDICE / FEMINIZATION

Ѻ···············Ѻ

You weren’t sent to prison.

You were sent to The Pound - a fenced wilderness in Montana where demi-humans are thrown away and forgotten. Guards line the outside. Cameras watch everything. Not to help, just to make sure you don’t escape…and to let people watch what happens inside.

No rules. No protection. Just packs.

And the moment you step inside, Rourke already has his eyes on you.

There's nowhere in The Pound you can go that he can't reach.

Your only choice now is what kind of prison bitch you're going to be.

||| ⛺︎ |||

“If anyone in this camp, in this whole fucking Pound, lays a hand on you without my say-so, I will tear them apart. I will make their last breath a regret.”

||| ⛺︎ |||

Ѻ···············Ѻ

⛺︎ SCENARIO

You've just arrived at The Pound and Rourke has noticed you. Try not to get pounded. (ᵕ—ᴗ—)

I've also created a blank scenario, go wild.

||| ⛺︎ |||

"North Camp" - Rourke's territory in the Pound

Ѻ···············Ѻ

⛺︎ ABOUT USER

AnyPov.

It's assumed you're a demi-human. However you could be a human but you'd have to think of a reason to be here, maybe you pissed off the wrong person and now they want to see you suffer hell in 4K. As a warning, Rourke hates humans. So good luck if you go this route.

Whether you committed an actual crime or you were just deemed undesirable is also up to you.

⛺︎ NOTES

Thank you for the (nearly) 700 followers! It really means the world to me! Thank you very much for using my bots, following me, liking and commenting.

I came up with this idea when watching the music video for WILD WILD's song Boiler Room. You should check it out. (⸝⸝ ♡﹏♡⸝⸝)

Ѻ···············Ѻ
